dataFlows.transformKql:
source
        | extend details = todynamic(details)
        | extend device = todynamic(device)
        | extend organization = todynamic(organization)
        | extend engine = tostring(engine)
        | extend action = tostring(action)
        | extend severity = tostring(severity)
        | extend _infectedObject =     case(
        engine in ("fileScanning", "manualScanning"), case(
    isnotempty(tostring(details.filePath)), tostring(details.filePath),
    isnotempty(tostring(details.object)), tostring(details.object),
    tostring(details.path)
),
        engine == "deepGuard" and not(tostring(details.name) matches regex @"Rarity: (\d+), Reputation: (\d+)" or tostring(details.name) == "DeepGuard blocks a rare application"), tostring(details.filePath),
        engine == "webTrafficScanning" and isnotempty(tostring(details.alertType)), tostring(details.url),
        engine == "webTrafficScanning", tostring(details.websiteUrl),
        engine == "amsi", tostring(details.path),
        ""
    )
        | extend _malwareName =     case(
        engine in ("fileScanning", "manualScanning"), case(
    isnotempty(tostring(details.name)), tostring(details.name),
    tostring(details.infectionName)
),
        engine == "deepGuard" and not(tostring(details.name) matches regex @"Rarity: (\d+), Reputation: (\d+)" or tostring(details.name) == "DeepGuard blocks a rare application"), tostring(details.name),
        engine == "webTrafficScanning" and isnotempty(tostring(details.alertType)), tostring(extract(@"[^/\\]+$", 0, tostring(details.process))),
        engine == "webTrafficScanning", tostring(extract(@"[^/\\]+$", 0, tostring(details.filePath))),
        engine == "amsi", tostring(details.infectionName),
        ""
    )
        | extend
            TimeGenerated = now(),
            PersistenceTimestamp = todatetime(persistenceTimestamp),
            Activity = case(
        engine == "webTrafficScanning", "Web Traffic Scanning event",
        engine == "webContentControl", "Web Content Control event",
        engine == "applicationControl", "Application Control event",
        engine == "fileScanning", "File Scanning event",
        engine == "manualScanning", "Manual Scanning event",
        engine == "realtimeScanning", "Real - time Scanning event",
        engine == "deviceControl", "Device Control event",
        engine == "deepGuard", "DeepGuard event",
        engine == "dataGuard", "DataGuard event",
        engine == "browsingProtection", "Browsing Protection event",
        engine == "connectionControl", "Network connection event",
        engine == "reputationBasedBrowsing", "Browsing Protection event",
        engine == "integrityChecker", "Integrity Checker event",
        engine == "tamperProtection", "Tamper Protection event",
        engine == "firewall", "Firewall event",
        engine == "amsi", "Antimalware Scan Interface (AMSI) event",
        engine == "connector", "Elements Connector event",
        engine == "setting", "Setting event",
        engine == "edr", "Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) event",
        engine == "xFence", "XFENCE event",
        engine == "systemEventsLog", "System event",
        engine == "activityMonitor", "Server Share Protection event",
        engine == "emailScan", "Email scanning event",
        engine == "emailBreach", "Email breach event",
        engine == "teamsScan", "Microsoft Teams scanning event",
        engine == "oneDriveScan", "Microsoft OneDrive scanning event",
        engine == "sharePointScan", "Microsoft SharePoint scanning event",
        engine == "inboxRuleScan", "Suspicious inbox rule event",
        engine == "activityMonitorClientProtection", "Activity Monitor Client Protection",
        engine
    ),
            DeviceVendor = "WithSecure",
            DeviceEventClassID = strcat(engine, ".", action),
            DeviceAction = action,
            SimplifiedDeviceAction = action,
            LogSeverity = case(
        severity == "critical", int(10),
        severity == "fatal_error", int(8),
        severity == "error", int(6),
        severity == "warning", int(4),
        severity == "info", int(1),
        int(null)
    ),
            Message = tostring(message),
            SourceHostName = case(
    isnotempty(tostring(device.name)), tostring(device.name),
    isnotempty(tostring(device.id)), tostring(device.id),
    isnotempty(tostring(device.winsAddress)), tostring(device.winsAddress),
    ""
),
            SourceUserName = tostring(details.userName),
            DeviceCustomString1 = _infectedObject,
            DeviceCustomString1Label = iif(isnotempty(_infectedObject), "Infected object", ""),
            DeviceCustomString2 = _malwareName,
            DeviceCustomString2Label = iif(isnotempty(_malwareName), "Malware", ""),
            AdditionalExtensions = strcat('{"accountName":"', tostring(organization.name), '",','"details":', iif(isempty(tostring(details)), "null", tostring(details)),'}')
        | project TimeGenerated, PersistenceTimestamp, Activity, DeviceVendor, DeviceEventClassID, DeviceAction, SimplifiedDeviceAction, LogSeverity, Message, SourceHostName, SourceUserName, DeviceCustomString1, DeviceCustomString1Label, DeviceCustomString2, DeviceCustomString2Label, AdditionalExtensions
